_comment: Quality gates configuration — enforces pipeline on every commit

PreToolUse.hook: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git commit"; then bash src/pipeline/gate-runner.sh || exit 2; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse._comment: Run quality gate pipeline before any git commit

PostToolUse.hook: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]]; then echo "[QUALITY] File modified: $FILE" >&2; fi; exit 0'
PostToolUse._comment: Log all file modifications for audit trail
